calendar.matters:
Petition Confirming Appointment Of Successor Trustees
Off Calendar Feb-10-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Hons Yung appeared by zoom for Petitioners.

The Court stated that this matter was continued at the last calling for service on Wells Fargo, that Wells Fargo has received notice and that Wells Fargo filed a consent. Mr. Yung confirmed that the Court is correct. The Court informed Mr. Yung that the tentative is for the Court to confirm the appointment of Paul Sax and Gary Herman as Co-Trustees, but it is not inclined to confirm the nomination of Mr. Malvey or Mr.Elias as successor trustees at this time because there is no vacancy in the office of trustee. The Court also spoke of the trust provisions and noted that this relief is not in the caption of the petition. Mr. Yung stated that one of the Trustees is getting older, that they were hoping to have this approved so that they would not have to come back and go through this again, and that they were doing this in an abundance of caution. The Petition Confirming Appointment of Successor Trustee is under submission.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

Petition Confirming Appointment Of Successor Trustees
Off Calendar Dec-15-2020 Continued To Jan-26-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition Confirming Appointment Of Successor Trustees
Off Calendar Oct-27-2020 Continued To Dec-15-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kadeidra Honey appeared by zoom for Gary Herman and Paul Sax (Co-Trustees).

The Court stated that there is no proof that Wells Fargo was served with notice and that Wells Fargo has a property interest pursuant to the trust. Ms. Honey stated that Wells Fargo declined to serve at one point, but she can serve them. The Court stated that if they did decline at one point, it doesn't mean they decline forever. The Petition Confirming Appointment of Successor Trustees is continued to December 15, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

Petition Confirming Appointment Of Successor Trustees
Off Calendar Oct-06-2020 Continued To Oct-27-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
